title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 03 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 03 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 03 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/09/2021
As of September 3, iron ore inventories across 35 ports tracked by SMM totalled 122.55 million mt, up 1.09 million mt from a week ago and 15.26million mt from a year ago. Daily average deliveries from the 35 ports decreased by 24,000 mt on a weekly basis to 2.67 million mt last week. The sharp decline in imported ore prices and output cuts at many steel mills curbed purchase activities.
